hero.tagline: Family tradition. Rare varieties. Sand and sea.

about.quote: "Every bottle carries the effort of three generations."
about.label: About Us
about.gen1text: It was not long ago that grapes in Lumbarda were carried by donkey from the vineyards to the winery — kilometres on foot, barrel by barrel. That is the world our family comes from. A wooden crusher, steady hands, and patience were all anyone had.
about.gen2text: When Stjepan retired some fifteen years ago, he gave the vineyards his full attention. He replanted two fields where old vines had grown for forty or fifty years, and cared for all seven of our vineyards across Lumbarda with the same dedication he always had.
about.gen3text: Three years ago Dominik took the next step — learning from an enologist friend, from books, from questions and curiosity. He began bottling the wine and opened our tasting space. We are a small family winery. Two grape varieties, seven vineyards, one honest passion.
about.closing: Small by size. Proud of every bottle.

grk.name: Grk
grk.desc: A rare native variety from Lumbarda. Mineral, salty and clean — a wine of sand and sea.

plavac.name: Plavac Mali
plavac.desc: Warm, dark and aromatic. A Dalmatian red with character, soft tannins and a long finish.

vineyards.label: Vineyards
vineyards.title: Seven vineyards in Lumbarda
vineyards.desc: Our parcels are spread across Lumbarda — from older vines to new plantings. Each plot has its own story, and we care for each one like family.

lumbarda.label: Lumbarda
lumbarda.title: Island of Korčula, Dalmatia
lumbarda.desc: Between sea and stone — Lumbarda is where the vine learns patience. Sun, salt and breeze give our wines their distinctive freshness.

oilmill.label: Oil mill
oilmill.title: Olive oil from the same place
oilmill.desc: Alongside our vineyards, we also care for olive trees. Simple, local and honest — oil that belongs to our family table and story.
